Core, demo, manufacturing test, SDK, system, and watchface applications for Pebble firmware, with headers for system app IDs and registry.

## Folders
- **[core_apps](core_apps/README.md)**: Panic window, progress UI, and spinner UI applications and headers for Pebble firmware.
- **[demo_apps](demo_apps/README.md)**: Demo applications and tests for Pebble firmware, including graphics, menus, sensors, and system features.
- **[prf_apps](prf_apps/README.md)**: Manufacturing test applications and metadata headers for Pebble firmware, including recovery and low power apps.
- **[sdk](sdk/README.md)**: Implements and declares functions for the SDK home application and metadata retrieval in Pebble firmware.
- **[system_apps](system_apps/README.md)**: Alarm, health, launcher, reminders, send_text, settings, timeline, toggle, weather, workout apps, and various Pebble firmware utilities and demos.
- **[watch](watch/README.md)**: Pebble watchface applications for step tracking, low-power mode, and TicToc app with JavaScript support.

## Files
- **[system_app_ids.h](system_app_ids.h.md)**: Includes the header file `system_app_ids.auto.h` for system application IDs.
- **[system_app_registry.h](system_app_registry.h.md)**: Includes the auto-generated header for the system app registry list in the Pebble firmware.
